nodes.label: PostgreSQL Database Service
nodes.rationale: Provisioned by the doctrine/doctrine-bundle Flex recipe. Uses postgres:16-alpine with a pg_isready healthcheck so dependents wait for readiness; data persists in a named volume, with a commented bind-mount alternative suggested to make accidental data loss harder.

nodes.label: Dev Database Port Override
nodes.rationale: Exposes PostgreSQL port 5432 only in the local override file so the database is reachable from the host during development without exposing it in the base composition.

nodes.label: Mailpit Dev Mailer Service
nodes.rationale: Provisioned by the symfony/mailer recipe: axllent/mailpit catches outgoing mail locally (SMTP 1025, UI 8025) and accepts any/insecure auth for development convenience.

nodes.label: Attribute Controller Route Import
nodes.rationale: Entry point of app routing: methods carrying the #[Route] attribute are auto-imported via the routing.controllers resource, so no per-route YAML is needed.

nodes.label: Dev Error Pages Routes
nodes.rationale: Loads FrameworkBundle error-page preview routes under /_error only in the dev environment.

nodes.label: Security Logout Route Loader
nodes.rationale: Logout routes are provided by the security.route_loader.logout service (type: service) rather than declared statically.

nodes.label: App Namespace Autowiring
nodes.rationale: All classes under src/ are registered as services keyed by FQCN with autowire and autoconfigure enabled, minimizing explicit service configuration; later definitions replace earlier ones when explicit config is needed.

nodes.label: AssetMapper Configuration
nodes.rationale: Maps the assets/ directory; missing_import_mode is strict in dev to surface broken imports early but relaxed to warn in prod to avoid hard failures at runtime.

nodes.label: Framework Cache Configuration
nodes.rationale: The app cache stores to the filesystem by default and should persist between deploys; Redis and APCu adapters are documented alternatives, with APCu discouraged under heavy random-write workloads due to memory fragmentation.

nodes.label: Stateless CSRF Protection
nodes.rationale: Stateless CSRF token ids (submit, authenticate, logout) protect forms, logins, and logouts without requiring server-side session storage for tokens.

nodes.label: VarDumper Server Forwarding
nodes.rationale: In dev, VarDumper data clones are forwarded to a centralized dump server (tcp://VAR_DUMPER_SERVER, started via server:dump) so dumps can be inspected on the CLI or in the browser instead of polluting responses.

nodes.label: Doctrine DBAL Connection
nodes.rationale: Connection resolved from the DATABASE_URL env var; profiling backtraces are collected only when kernel.debug is on. In the test environment a dbname_suffix (_test plus TEST_TOKEN) isolates per-process databases for ParaTest.

nodes.label: Doctrine ORM Mapping
nodes.rationale: Entities in src/Entity are mapped via PHP attributes under the App\Entity prefix with the underscore naming strategy; identity generation is preferred on PostgreSQLPlatform, matching the Postgres database service.

nodes.label: Prod Doctrine Cache Pools
nodes.rationale: In prod, ORM query and result caches are routed to dedicated pools (doctrine.system_cache_pool on cache.system, doctrine.result_cache_pool on cache.app) to improve performance without affecting dev/test behavior.

nodes.label: Doctrine Migrations Configuration
nodes.rationale: Migrations live in the project migrations/ directory under the DoctrineMigrations namespace, deliberately different from App\Migrations so migration classes are never autoloaded; the migrations profiler is disabled.

nodes.label: Session Configuration (lazy start, mock storage in test)
nodes.norm_label: session configuration (lazy start, mock storage in test)

nodes.label: Messenger Message Routing (SendEmailMessage, ChatMessage, SmsMessage to async)
nodes.norm_label: messenger message routing (sendemailmessage, chatmessage, smsmessage to async)

nodes.label: Notifier Channel Policy (all urgency levels routed to email)
nodes.norm_label: notifier channel policy (all urgency levels routed to email)

nodes.label: Router Default URI (DEFAULT_URI for non-HTTP URL generation)
nodes.norm_label: router default uri (default_uri for non-http url generation)

nodes.label: Password Hashers (auto, reduced cost in test)
nodes.norm_label: password hashers (auto, reduced cost in test)

nodes.label: Twig Configuration (*.twig pattern, strict_variables in test)
nodes.norm_label: twig configuration (*.twig pattern, strict_variables in test)

nodes.label: Stateless CSRF Protection (check_header, for Turbo forms/logins)
nodes.norm_label: stateless csrf protection (check_header, for turbo forms/logins)

nodes.norm_label: validator configuration (auto-mapping hint, not_compromised_password off in test)

nodes.norm_label: web profiler (toolbar in dev, collect disabled in test)
